scripts.desktop:dev: concurrently -k "npm --workspace @laboratorio/web run dev" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env LABORATORIO_WEB_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 npm --workspace @laboratorio/desktop run start"
scripts.desktop:build: npm run web:build && npm --workspace @laboratorio/desktop run package
scripts.mobile:sync: npm run web:build && npm --workspace @laboratorio/mobile run sync
scripts.mobile:android: npm run web:build && npm --workspace @laboratorio/mobile run android
